title: Let Me Feed You!
description: Allow players to feed each other!
body:
This mod allows players to feed each other.

If the food returns an item (such as the bowl of a mushroom stew) in the finishUsingItem method, the feeder will get it back. 

The hunger threshold required for being fed and the food blacklist are configurable.
![Feeding](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ecbf8c630de28ffd66f4dd784557a1e843b793d9.png)
